name: ceo-auto-resolution-demo
description: Curated CEO demo scenarios grounded in salesforcetesting2 tickets and fixtures.

scenarios.label: Knowledge publish blocked
scenarios.businessProblem: A Spanish Knowledge translation draft is stuck and Publish is greyed out even for a Knowledge Manager.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Explain Draft Translations list view, Submit for Review, and Spanish queue authorization from repo guidance.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ANSWER_ONLY with Draft Translations / Submit for Review guidance; optional approved mutation can submit for review.

scenarios.label: Attach article to Case
scenarios.businessProblem: An agent found an internal Knowledge article and needs it attached to a Case for metrics and emailed from the console.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Guide attach via Case Articles / Insert Knowledge and optionally post the answer onto a seeded Case Feed.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ANSWER_ONLY with Case Articles / Insert Knowledge guidance; live mode can write to Case Feed.

scenarios.label: Milestone lock guardrail
scenarios.businessProblem: Case Status cannot change because an Entitlement Milestone is locked by an open system transaction — agents ask how to override.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Diagnose the lock and refuse unsafe overrides; wait/retry, verify milestones, escalate to admin only.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: No-override diagnosis from CaseMilestoneLockGuidance; no Salesforce mutation.

scenarios.label: Sales Cloud how-to
scenarios.businessProblem: A lead lands in the wrong queue even though postal-code assignment rules exist.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Explain the Assign using active assignment rules checkbox on Lead edit — procedural Sales Cloud guidance.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ANSWER_ONLY procedural guidance; optional demo Account for Sales breadth, no mutation.

scenarios.label: Missing Entitlement timer
scenarios.businessProblem: An enterprise Case has an active Contract, but the SLA Milestone countdown timer never appears in the console.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Explain that Entitlement must be linked on the Case itself — Contract alone is not enough.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ANSWER_ONLY: set Entitlement Name lookup on the Case; optional live Case Feed writeback.

scenarios.label: Parent-Child Case structure
scenarios.businessProblem: A large implementation Case needs IT, Finance, and Shipping sub-tasks while keeping one umbrella Case open.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Guide creating Child Cases from the Parent Case related list and keep ownership/status clear.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ANSWER_ONLY Parent/Child Case how-to; seeded parent + child Cases in org for walkthrough.

scenarios.label: Case clone skips assignment rules
scenarios.businessProblem: Cloning a resolved Case keeps ownership on the agent instead of routing to the Tier 1 Queue.
scenarios.whatSystemShouldDo: Explain the Assign using active assignment rules checkbox on the Clone edit screen.
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ANSWER_ONLY clone assignment guidance; seeded Case available for live answer writeback.
